contact.label: LOCK IN
contact.heading: Line up your next target.
contact.subtext: Got a project in scope? Send a message, we'll zero in on the brief.

form.name: Name
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

hero.label: COMMS UPLINK
hero.heading: Open the channel
hero.intro: Satellite relays, ground stations, and encrypted uplinks — CPWD is standing by for incoming intel. Scroll to establish the link.

orbital.label: ORBITAL RELAY
orbital.heading: Satellite uplink active
orbital.body: Three LEO relays orbit above the network. Downlink to the CPWD uplink gate — signal strength green, latency within spec.

ground.label: GROUND ARRAY
ground.heading: Ground stations online
ground.body: Modems, Wi-Fi 6, LTE, 5G NR, and fiber — every node in the array is tied to the uplink gate. Your message can route in on any path.

secure.label: SECURE HANDSHAKE
secure.heading: Encrypted channel
secure.body: TLS 1.3 end-to-end. Payload hashed, route verified. No plaintext on the line — only targeted intel to info{'@'}cpwd.nl.
directives: Reply within 24 hours on business days

transmit.label: UPLINK TERMINAL
transmit.heading: Send your intel
transmit.subtext: Fill in the form. Your message routes straight to our uplink gate — no middle stations.
transmit.route: GND → UPLINK GATE → SAT-042 → CPWD HQ
